name: Goldilocks NTT — Scalar Verificado + Calibración + E-Graph Discovery + SIMD

phases.name: Fix 32-bit bloqueantes
phases.description: lowerMontyReduceSub hardcodes R=2^32, temps hardcode int64_t. Both break Goldilocks (k=64). Conditional branch if k>32, parametric wideType.

study.notes: Mirror hand-written code from OptimizedNTTPipeline.lean:254-263 (shift-subtract with halves). lowerMontyReduceSub:50 hardcodes 2^32-1. Branch at VerifiedPlanCodeGen.lean:110-111 with if k > 32. De-risk: verify BabyBear regression first. L-731: Goldilocks exceeds Int64Range — unbounded evaluator needed. L-626: evalMicroC wraps at ops not storage.

nodes.name: Parametrize C/Rust temp declarations by k (__int128/i128 for k=64)

study.notes: 6 string changes in VerifiedPlanCodeGen.lean: lines 366 (R4 int64_t→wideType), 373-374 (butterfly temps), 392 (Rust wideType i64→i128), 398-400, 409-411. Use if k==64 then __int128/i128 else int64_t/i64. Zero risk for 32-bit fields.

blocks.name: Fix 32-bit bloqueantes
blocks.gate: lake build PASS + benchmark.py --validation-only --fields babybear,koalabear,mersenne31 --sizes 14 PASS (no-regression)

phases.name: Verificar Goldilocks scalar
phases.description: Run validated Goldilocks scalar NTT through benchmark pipeline. No code changes — pure validation gate.

study.notes: Run: benchmark.py --validation-only --fields goldilocks --hardware arm-scalar --sizes 14. Also Rust: --langs rust. goldilocksConfig exists at OptimizedNTTPipeline.lean:115-121. If fails, debug is in Fase -1 fixes.

phases.name: Calibración empírica del cost model
phases.description: Create bench_goldi_isolated.c with 4 fold variants, measure ns/call, build InstructionProfile, validate exprCostHW ratios. Prerequisite for Fase 2 (dynamic cost validation).

study.notes: Template from bench_redc_isolated.c (127 LOC). 4 variants: fold_mul, fold_shiftsub, fold_halves, NEON Karatsuba 2-lane. Count V0/dual instructions via objdump. Add goldilocksProfile_* to CrossRelNTT.lean alongside redcProfile_vmull:112. Validate exprCostHW ratios match measured ratios within 20%. Ref: Harvey 2014 (redundant representation). L-201: native_decide only for p<2^32, use zpowMod for Goldilocks.

blocks.name: Calibración empírica
blocks.gate: bench_goldi_calibration.md with measured ns/call + InstructionProfile + model vs measured ratio check

phases.name: Shift-subtract e-graph rule
phases.description: MixedSoundRule: hi*(2^32-1) ≡ hi*2^32 - hi. Uses existing constructors. Proof via Nat.mul_sub + omega.

study.notes: Use / 2^64 and % 2^64 (not >>> and &&&). Proof: Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib closes hi*(2^32-1)=hi*2^32-hi directly (no omega needed). Add to generateVocabulary or as extra rule in guidedOptimizeMixedF. ~15 LOC. Verify optimizeReduction babybearConfig unchanged after.

phases.name: Karatsuba via ModularRewriteRule
phases.description: New ModularRewriteRule type for modular-only rewrites (phi^2=phi-1). Goldilocks Karatsuba: 4 muls → 3 via phi decomposition. Risk: e-graph blowup.

study.notes: RewriteRule at MixedEMatch.lean:194-198 is template. ModularRewriteRule adds prime field + auto-wraps RHS in reduceGate(rhs, p). Stay in Nat with % p equality (expert advice: avoid ZMod dependency). Karatsuba: a*b = a0*b0 - a1*b1 + ((a0+a1)(b0+b1)-a0*b0)*phi mod p. Uses kronUnpackLo/Hi(32), mulGate, addGate, subGate. Risk: 3 sub-expressions per mulGate → set maxNodes limit. MUST verify BabyBear optimizeReduction unchanged. Ref: SPIRAL/NTTX (Karatsuba multi-word). L-712: WellFormedPat required for Pattern.eval correctness.

blocks.name: Karatsuba ModularRewriteRule
blocks.gate: lake build PASS + optimizeReduction babybearConfig arm_cortex_a76 unchanged + e-graph terminates within maxNodes

phases.name: Fused-cost pattern rule
phases.description: Pattern rule for widening multiply optimization. Uses existing ReductionAlternativeRules mechanism — context-aware via saturation, not costFn.

study.notes: Pattern: mulGate(kronUnpackLo(x,32), kronUnpackLo(y,32)) → equivalent fused node. Uses existing mechanism from ReductionAlternativeRules.lean:93-106. ~10 LOC. Does NOT change computeCostsF signature.

blocks.name: E-graph rules ligeras (shift-subtract + fused-cost)
blocks.gate: lake build PASS + optimizeReduction babybearConfig arm_cortex_a76 produces same strategyName as v3.7.0

phases.name: Canal dinámico e-graph ↔ plan
phases.description: Connect discoveryReductionCostPerStage to planTotalCost via opt-in reductionCostForHW_dynamic with fallback for known fields. Close the 'last meter' gap.

study.notes: 5-step protocol from idea doc §Fase 2: (1) compareCosts diagnostic, (2) fallback for known fields (diff>2→static), (3) A/B benchmark, (4) cache 14→1 saturations, (5) graduation. UltraConfig.useDynamicCost := false default. 9 consumers of reductionCostForHW listed in idea doc §4.3. lazy_eq_solinas_cost (NTTPlan.lean:302-303 rfl) MUST NOT break. smulGate(3) vs mulGate(11) discrepancy: 6≠14 dynamic vs static. Investigate before connecting.

blocks.name: Canal dinámico con fallback
blocks.gate: compareCosts report for all fields + A/B benchmark BabyBear >=A-3% + useDynamicCost=false identical to v3.7.0

phases.name: NeonIntrinsic 64-bit + Goldilocks butterfly
phases.description: Add 7 constructors to NeonIntrinsic (14 lines in toCName/fromCName). Write goldilocksButterfly4Stmt as Stmt.call sequence. Expectation: ~1.3-1.5x vs scalar (2 lanes of 64-bit).

study.notes: 7 constructors: add_u64, sub_u64, load2_u64, store2_u64, widening_mul32, narrow_high32, narrow_low32. Cost: 7×2=14 lines (toCName + fromCName). isVoid has catch-all. fromCName must be exhaustive for allCallsKnown. Adding ctors breaks ALL exhaustive matches at compile time (lake build shows locations). goldilocksButterfly4Stmt follows sqdmulhButterflyStmt pattern (VerifiedSIMDButterfly.lean:65-94). Karatsuba decomposition: 3 vmull_u32 + recombination + fold. Ref: HACLxN (verified NEON vectorization), van der Hoeven 2024 (SIMD NTT with NEON).

blocks.name: NeonIntrinsic 64-bit + Goldilocks butterfly
blocks.gate: lake build PASS + fromCName roundtrip examples for all 7 intrinsics + goldilocksButterfly4Stmt produces valid Stmt (allCallsKnown)

phases.name: Pipeline + benchmark final
phases.description: Wire Goldilocks SIMD dispatch in emitStageC/Rust for k=64. Add neonTempDecls64. Full benchmark: scalar + NEON + no-regression.

nodes.name: Pipeline dispatch k=64 + neonTempDecls64 + full benchmark

study.notes: Dispatch emitStageC/Rust for k=64 → goldilocksButterfly4Stmt path. neonTempDecls64 for uint64x2_t, uint32x2_t. Full benchmark: --fields goldilocks --hardware arm-neon --sizes 14. Expectation: ~1.3-1.5x vs scalar (2 NEON lanes). No-regression: --fields babybear --sizes 14 must be ±3%.

blocks.name: Pipeline + benchmark final
blocks.gate: benchmark.py --validation-only --fields goldilocks --hardware arm-neon --sizes 14 PASS + BabyBear ±3% vs v3.7.0

performance: BabyBear benchmarks ±3% vs v3.7.0 after every block

A/B benchmark: dynamic cost BabyBear >= static-3%

Goldilocks NTT Rust output matches Python reference element-by-element

dependency_graph: B0 → B1 → {B2 || B3a || B3b || B5} → B4 (waits B2+B3a+B3b) → B6 (waits B4+B5)
total_parallel: ~12-14 days with agent teams on B3a||B3b||B5
